evidence_label: compact PubMed outbound-packet refresh, not treatment advice
query: (thalassemia OR beta-thalassemia) AND (HUDEP2 OR CD34 OR erythroid OR HBG OR HbF OR hemolysis OR autophagy) AND 2026[pdat]

records.role: gamma-globin regulation context; keeps HBG/HbF readouts explicit in any packet
records.title: p27Kip1 regulates gamma-globin production.

records.role: editing delivery benchmark; not a preclinical quote action route
records.title: In vivo genome editing of human haematopoietic stem cells for treatment of blood disorders using mRNA delivery.

records.role: erythroid metabolism context; optional endpoint addendum only
records.title: Understanding and targeting erythroid cell metabolism.

records.role: non-editing HbF pharmacology benchmark; high-caution source only
records.title: Discovery of a Novel DNMT1 Inhibitor with Improved Efficacy in Treating beta-Thalassemia.

records.role: gene-therapy strategy benchmark; not first-quote routing
records.title: New Gene Therapy Strategy for beta-Thalassemia.

records.role: ligand-trap clinical context; not first-quote routing
records.title: Clinical Applications of Ligand Traps Targeting Activin Type II Receptors.

decision_use: No source found on June 15 changes the first quote packet. The outbound packet should remain public-safe, preclinical, approval-gated, and limited to model, endpoint, controls, raw-data, cost, timeline, ethics, biosafety, and material-constraint questions.
